title: EASYLOCK 6Pack 1300ML Snap-on Plastic Food Storage Containers with Lids Meal Prep Containers Reusable Microwavable Bento Lunch Box Set Freezer Storage Boxes
features: Need to know: Please note that unlike regular crisper boxes, these are made from a lighter material, so you can take it out without a burden. When not in use, food containers can be nested to save a lot of storage space

Lock the delicious food: Simply press the lid down to cover the food container tightly, keeping it fresh for a long time, and simply open the air holes in the lid to vent the steam from the food container

Use EASYLOCK everywhere: Who doesn't want to have a food storage container that can be easily taken out? It can not only be used at home, but also be easily taken out, whether in the office, school or outdoors
Put your health in first: EASYLOCK plastic food containers are made by food grade plastic, reusable and durable. They are good for the health, bringing more peace of mind for your family

Microwave, freezer, dishwasher safe: Our food containers are resistant to high temperatures, so you can reheat food directly in the microwave (without lids, 2-4 mins under 140℃). And it's no problem to refrigerate in the refrigerator too(≧-20℃)
description: Product Description Worried about messy kitchen cabinets? EASYLOCK products can easily solve this problem EASYLOCK products have various sizes and capacities of food storage containers.Appropriate unique design, fashionable appearance, it is a good aid of you when you are at home or go out for traveling. Airtight lid High quality Easy to use & clean <6 Pack> Plastic Food Storage Containers Set with Lid Vents ----------------Effective arrangement of food and kitchen space, just these food containers！ Lightweight material, you don't need to open the lid, just open the lid vent to exhausting the air from the food container. Meet your daily needs, from kitchens, pantry, refrigerators to parks, schools and offices, practical and reusable. Different sizes and capacities, nuts, snacks, fruits, vegetables, salads, meats,meal prep,leftovers etc. can be stored, which is very inclusive. Brand：EASYLOCK Capacity：6*1300ml/44oz Simple, clean and space saving design. The Right Choice of Food Containers----Convenience for your life More Features About Our Product ↓ High temperature resistance from -4°F to 248°F, could be used in oven, microwave, dishwasher, refrigerator. (It should be noted that it needs to be opened the air hole when using them.) The product is light and easy to carry with normal capacity. It is suitable for daily storage. Besides family storage, it is also suitable for school, office, gym, park or dining out. These containers are designed to be stackable and space-saving, which can save you a lot of space and keep your kitchen organized. When not in use, it can be nested in the nest for easy storage. More Details About Our Product ↓ Air Hole This air hole design can lock the freshness of the food in the container, and also can open the air hole to expel excess air when necessary. Clamshell Design This clamshell design is easy to open the container without too much effort, and it is 100% airtight. BPA Free Plastic Thicken pp material,BPA free,durable and sturdy.
